metadata.source: Alibaba.com public product listings collected into local structured dataset
notes: This category file uses the same top-level structure as data/products.json.
Product row fields are identical to the canonical products array in data/products.json.
source_url stores the Alibaba product detail page.
image_file stores the relative path to the downloaded product main image.

supplier_fields.note: Supplier fields are public page fields and may change over time.

supplier_korean_fields.source: Generated from supplier fields in data/products.json
supplier_korean_fields.note: Korean supplier values are display translations/transliterations. Original Alibaba supplier values are preserved.

image_storage.note: Product main images are converted to PNG and grouped by category for Figma compatibility.

multilingual_fields.note: Display values are separated under product.localized. Legacy flat fields are preserved for compatibility.

price_fields.note: Range prices are split into min and max integer KRW values. Single prices use the same value for min and max.
